name: Hamburgers with Peach Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peach, tomato, garlic and jalapeno pepper in food processor and process or mince by hand. Remove mixture to a bowl.
2. Add sugar, cider vinegar, salt and pepper to taste. Stir until combined. Let stand while making hamburgers.
3. Place hamburgers on buns. Top each with half the relish.
4. Serve immediately.
Makes 2 servings.
